description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring a driveway, a detached garage, and a backyard with a pool. The main structure has a gable roof with visible chimneys and a combination of brick and siding exterior walls. The front yard is adorned with trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn, while the backyard includes a patio area and a swimming pool surrounded by fencing. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for ample natural light. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design reflects a classic Ranch-style bungalow with modern landscaping elements.
description: A single-story Ranch-style bungalow with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, detached garage, landscaped yard, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: From above the driveway, the main entrance, garage, and the arrangement of the front and side yards are visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is shown, featuring the backyard, patio, pool, and additional trees.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the backyard pool, patio area, and the rear side of the bungalow, with the garage and driveway in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
